logoStory.title: The mark
logoStory.body: My initials, set inside aluminium's 2-8-3 electron shells — element 13: light, durable, precise. That's the bar for the things I build.

profile.name: Adrian Petrovic
profile.tagline: A passionate computer scientist based in Switzerland, focused on efficient software and modern product thinking.

shell.title: portfolio.sh
welcome: Select a command to inspect profile, skills, and project work.

commands.label: Identity
output: Long-term goal: complete higher education at ETH Zurich and work as a software engineer. Potential AI-/ML-specialisation.
I enjoy building, breaking, and reimagining technology across software and hardware.

commands.label: Core Stack
output: Core skills: Python, JavaScript (+TS), Swift, Java
Relevant frameworks: Tkinter, React, Swift UIKit, etc.
I prioritize robust architecture and practical delivery.

commands.label: Career Journey
output: 2024-08: Continued employment with 40% at Staeubli AG.

commands.label: Project Highlights
commands.description: A few notable projects from my portfolio.
output: HilRes: strong technical depth in HIL resource management with TDD.
MessageLogger: showcases recent Python GUI work with many features and polish.
RegBankSight: first Python GUI project, evolved from a simple register viewer into a comprehensive tool with many features and polish.
Projects below are ordered by proudness score (highest first) and then alphabetically.

projectsSection.description: Projects spanning apprenticeship work, hackathons, and side builds.

hilres.name: IPA/LAP: HilRes (Grade 5.5)
hilres.description: Python module for managing Hardware-In-the-Loop resources to run tests in parallel with an extensible architecture and TDD workflow.

portfolio-website.name: New Portfolio Website
portfolio-website.description: This portfolio website with a terminal-inspired interface, animated custom logo system, and structured content architecture.

idpa-staubli-chatgpt.name: IDPA - Staubli ChatGPT (Grade 5.5)
idpa-staubli-chatgpt.description: Interdisciplinary apprenticeship project analyzing Staubli's in-house chatbot via interviews, surveys, and usage data to produce recommendations.

regbanksight.name: RegBankSight
regbanksight.description: Application to visualize FPGA register banks in a tree structure with UART-based read/write access down to field level.

circleviz.name: CircleViz
circleviz.description: Python script that generates circle comparison diagrams inspired by popular AI model visual benchmarks.

ai-arcade.name: AI Arcade
ai-arcade.description: Platform for AI-generated games with a library of 16 experiences ranging from simple skill games to complex 3D gameplay.

sharctestrunner.name: SharcTestRunner
sharctestrunner.description: Model-based test execution framework for HIL systems, including model import, Python conversion, execution, and issue reporting.

tiktaktoe.name: TikTakToe (Grade 5.5)
tiktaktoe.description: TikTok-style social media clone built during apprenticeship with Swift and Firebase as a proof of full-featured mobile delivery.

cool-encryption-tool.name: Cool Encryption Tool
cool-encryption-tool.description: Python Tkinter desktop app for file encryption/decryption created as a school project.

dinervc-lab.name: Dinervc Lab
dinervc-lab.description: Portfolio experiment in Vue.js that demonstrated adaptability and quick learning in an unfamiliar framework.

viewpeakclips.name: ViewPeakClips
viewpeakclips.description: Tool for splitting long videos into social-ready clips with management and upload workflows.

reflectory.name: Reflectory (Hackathon Winner)
reflectory.description: AI-powered mental health app built from scratch over one weekend, winning Best Solo Hack at Hack United 2023.

dice-dash.name: Dice Dash
dice-dash.description: Pig Dice-inspired browser game with multiplayer mode, strong AI opponent, custom settings, and immersive audio.

webglide.name: Webglide
webglide.description: Prompt-driven website generation concept created for startup exploration and school presentation work.

slitherscript.name: SlitherScript
slitherscript.description: Snake game variant with power-ups, dynamic walls, and tunable difficulty for varied gameplay sessions.

demmin-reading-journal.name: Die Gespenster von Demmin Reading Journal
demmin-reading-journal.description: HTML/CSS reading journal concept with custom typography and visual design built for a school assignment.

messagelogger.name: MessageLogger
messagelogger.description: Desktop app to visualize machine command logs as sequence diagrams, timing diagrams with message relations for pattern discovery, or sortable tables. With in-app log fetching from custom Staubli hardware via an internally generated Python commands interface.

contactSection.note: Feel free to reach out through any channel below.
